_instructions: Copy this file to knowledge/games/<kebab-case-game-name>.json and fill in all fields.
Remove all _instructions and _comment fields before submitting.
Delete optional sections that do not apply rather than leaving them empty.
Verify config paths against a real installation before submitting.
Every recommended value must have a source citation in the top-level sources array.
game: REQUIRED — exact display name of the game, e.g. 'Dead Island 2'
engine: REQUIRED — engine name matching the engine field in a knowledge/game-engines/ file, or 'unknown'
engine_version: OPTIONAL — specific version string if known, e.g. '4.25'
profile_version: REQUIRED — semantic version of this profile, e.g. '1.0.0'. Increment minor for new keys or corrections, patch for typo/source fixes.
updated: REQUIRED — ISO 8601 date of last meaningful update, e.g. '2026-04-28'

platforms._comment: One entry per store/platform. Duplicate the block if the game is on multiple stores with different paths.
platforms.store: REQUIRED — e.g. 'Steam', 'Epic Games Store', 'GOG', 'Xbox Game Pass', 'Battle.net'

config_files.path: REQUIRED — full path using env var placeholders: %USERPROFILE%, %APPDATA%, %LOCALAPPDATA%, %PROGRAMFILES%, %PROGRAMFILES(X86)%
config_files.format: REQUIRED — one of: ini, json, xml, cfg, txt

keys._comment: One entry per config key. Repeat block for each key. Remove _comment field.
keys.key: REQUIRED — exact key name as it appears in the config file, e.g. 'sg.ShadowQuality'
keys.section: OPTIONAL — section header the key lives under, e.g. '[/Script/Engine.GameUserSettings]'
keys.effect: REQUIRED — plain English description of what the key controls

recommendations.performance: REQUIRED — recommended value for a performance goal
recommendations.balanced: REQUIRED — recommended value for a balanced goal
recommendations.quality: REQUIRED — recommended value for a quality goal

keys.notes: OPTIONAL — version caveats, hardware requirements, or other considerations for this specific key

engine_overrides._comment: OPTIONAL section — only include if this game overrides engine defaults in ways that would cause incorrect recommendations. Remove _comment field.
engine_overrides.key: REQUIRED — the key (or 'sg.*' glob) that is overridden
engine_overrides.behaviour: REQUIRED — describe exactly what the game does differently from the engine default, e.g. 'Reset on launch by in-game menu'
engine_overrides.action: REQUIRED — what ReFrame should do instead, e.g. 'Use in-game slider; direct INI edits will be overwritten'

manual_only_settings._comment: OPTIONAL section — settings that can only be changed via in-game menus, not config files. Remove _comment field.
manual_only_settings.setting: REQUIRED — display name of the setting as shown in the game menu
manual_only_settings.location: REQUIRED — menu path, e.g. 'Settings → Graphics → Field of View'
manual_only_settings.reason: REQUIRED — why this setting matters for the goal or modifier

notes: OPTIONAL — version-specific caveats, known bugs, or other considerations that apply to the game as a whole
sources: REQUIRED — at least one URL. Accepted: PCGamingWiki, official engine docs, developer patch notes, game official support. Avoid SEO guides and untrusted forums.
